preToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat); if [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ]; then TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('toolName', ''))" 2>/dev/null || true); CONTEXT="graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."; case "$TOOL" in grep_search|read_file|list_directory|glob|run_shell_command) echo "{\"permissionDecision\": \"allow\", \"additionalContext\": \"$CONTEXT\"}"; exit 0 ;; esac; if [ "$TOOL" = "shell" ] || [ "$TOOL" = "execute_command" ]; then CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); args=d.get('toolArgs', {}); print(args.get('command', args.get('bash', '')))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *) echo "{\"permissionDecision\": \"allow\", \"additionalContext\": \"$CONTEXT\"}"; exit 0 ;; esac; fi; fi; echo "{\"permissionDecision\": \"allow\"}"
